items.html: A hack exposed Suno's source code confirming it scraped YouTube, Deezer, and podcasts for AI training without disclosed consent — record labels are invoking DMCA.
Patreon is now actively blocking AI training bots via Cloudflare, moving beyond robots.txt to hard access denial as scraping tactics grow more aggressive.
TikTok is piloting an opt-in tool that detects AI-generated likenesses of creators and enables reporting, mirroring YouTube's existing synthetic-impersonation protection.
Google open-sourced GNM Head, a free parametric 3D human head model with 170+ controls and a Blender add-on — immediately useful for character and facial-variation work.
NVIDIA and Hugging Face jointly released NeMo Automodel, enabling large-scale fine-tuning of video and image diffusion models including FLUX checkpoints with LoRA examples.
Moonshot AI's open-source Kimi K3 is benchmarking near Claude and GPT — another free frontier-level writing and reasoning model now in the mix for creators.

brief.title: Sunday, July 19 — six things creators need to know

tooldrop.name: Review by Eddie AI
tooldrop.blurb: AI-powered video review tool that lets editors and clients leave time-stamped feedback directly on footage — cuts the back-and-forth for video creators.

stories.title: Suno Can Write a Hit. It Still Can't Write a Career.
stories.dek: AI music has cleared the sonic bar. It keeps tripping over a different one entirely.

stories.title: Museums Won't Touch AI Art. That's Starting to Crack.
stories.dek: The institutional art world has spent years treating AI-generated work like a rumor it hopes will go away. It won't, and a few cracks in the wall are getting hard to ignore.

stories.title: Nvidia's Japan push: sovereign AI, robotics, and chip supply deals
stories.dek: Jensen Huang secured partnerships across Japan's tech ecosystem, including a national AI factory and robotics collaborations. The strategy targets manufacturing and physical AI applications.

stories.title: Artist 1010Benja makes genuinely engaging song with Suno AI
stories.dek: A working creator demonstrates compositional intent and distinctive voice using Suno, contradicting the widespread perception that AI music is inherently generic. The Verge profiles the work and artist's unapologetic stance on the tool.

stories.title: Nonprofit Current AI launches offline multilingual AI device for rural India
stories.dek: Current AI released Suno Sutra, an open-source device running AI in 22 Indian languages without internet, addressing AI's linguistic blind spots in the Global South.
